%dw 2.0
type auto_710165c4_9dba_473c_9cf2_c1e63bd59eb7_Output_Payload = { dateTime: String, data?: {| customer: {| shippingCity?: String, website?: String, accountName: String, lastModifiedDate?: String, shippingStreet?: String, accountType?: String, externalId?: String, industry?: String, billingState?: String, shippingPostalCode?: String, accountNumber?: String, ownerId?: String, phoneNumber?: String, createdDate?: String, billingStreet?: String, billingPostalCode?: String, shippingCountry?: String, billingCountry?: String, shippingState?: String, salesforceAccountId?: String, billingCity?: String, activeFlag?: Boolean |} {"label": "Customer", "description": "Account record retrieved from Salesforce."} |} {"label": "Salesforce Customer Single Get Data", "description": "Payload representing a single Salesforce customer record."}, httpStatus: Number, correlationId?: String, details?: Array<{ severity: "ERROR" | "INFO" | "WARNING", code?: String, message: String, target?: String, _?: Any } {"description": "Structured detail message returned by the API.

Detail messages provide additional actionable information such as validation failures, skipped
records, unsupported values, or other context that helps the client understand the outcome
without changing the top-level response message.
", "label": "Response detail"}> {"description": "Optional list of structured detail messages that provide additional context,
such as validation failures, warnings, or informational notes.
"}, message: String, status: "SUCCESS" | "ERROR" | "WARNING", _?: Any } {"label": "Get Salesforce Brilliant Mule Customer Response", "description": "Standard API response envelope with a single customer retrieval payload."}

Field names are human-readable but remain aligned to Salesforce Account concepts rather
than the enterprise canonical customer model.
", "label": "Salesforce Customer"}> {"label": "Customers", "description": "Account records retrieved from Salesforce."} |} {"label": "Salesforce Customer Get Data", "description": "Payload representing multiple Salesforce customer records."}, httpStatus: Number, correlationId?: String, details?: Array<{ severity: "ERROR" | "INFO" | "WARNING", code?: String, message: String, target?: String, _?: Any } {"description": "Structured detail message returned by the API.
